title: Current BTC short update of my BTC ML MODEL: +1,400 points so far
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Sharing a live trade update from my BTC system.

I entered a **short** at the **25-04-2026 UTC open** around **77,430**, and price is currently around **76,000**, which puts the trade at roughly **+1,400 points** in profit so far.

What makes this trade interesting is that it went about **1,500 points against me** at one point before turning back in the intended direction. That is exactly why I trust the system — it is built to hold through noise when the setup is still valid, instead of reacting emotionally to every move.

For me, this is the value of a systematic model:

* It gives the trade room when the thesis is still intact.
* It avoids emotional decision-making mid-trade.
* It can capture the larger directional move even after temporary adverse action.

I’ve been live trading the system since September, and this is a good example of why I trust the process more than short-term price swings. The model is designed to be selective, adaptive, and patient, which matters a lot in BTC when the market can move sharply in both directions before the real move develops.

Backtesting of the model was done on over 4 years of data and the test showed Sharpe of >3, CAGR of \~56% and it outperformed BTC by around 150,000 points with fixed lots.

I am looking for someone who could use this model at its full potential as I am unable to generate sufficient returns with my small capital.

If anyone is interested in acquiring the model , I’m open to a straightforward conversation.



https://preview.redd.it/8l5ebso28yxg1.png?width=1001&format=png&auto=webp&s=286234da770359cd702c0a3bc135a59ae17bfb9a

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Hey mate, did you even check my system stats before addressing me as a scammer.

Why dont you first check my report and then lets have a conversation.
